author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR moves stored classes in the said `SimDataFormats` packages to the `io_v1` namespace

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1980

#### PR validation:

Code compiles
title: [EVOLUTION_X] Move stored products in `SimDataFormats/{Associations,Calo*,Track*,Vertex}` to `io_v1` namespace
